segments.text: On that day a fountain will be opened to the house of David and the inhabitants of Jerusalem, to cleanse them from sin and impurity.
On that day, I will banish the names of the idols from the land, and they will be remembered no more. I will remove both the prophets and the spirit of impurity from the land.
segments.speaker: The Lord Almighty

segments.text: And if anyone still prophesies, their father and mother, to whom they were born, will say to them,
You must die, because you have told lies in the Lord's name.
segments.speaker: Parents

segments.text: Then their own parents will stab the one who prophesies.
On that day every prophet will be ashamed of their prophetic vision. They will not put on a prophet's garment of hair in order to deceive.
I am not a prophet. I am a farmer; the land has been my livelihood since my youth.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: What are these wounds on your body?
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: The wounds I was given at the house of my friends.
segments.speaker: Unknown

verses.title: The Shepherd Struck, the Sheep Scattered

segments.text: Awake, sword, against my shepherd, against the man who is close to me! Strike the shepherd, and the sheep will be scattered, and I will turn my hand against the little ones.
segments.speaker: The Lord Almighty

segments.text: Two-thirds will be struck down and perish; yet one-third will be left in it.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: This third I will put into the fire; I will refine them like silver and test them like gold. They will call on my name and I will answer them; I will say, 'They are my people,' and they will say, 'The Lord is our God.'
segments.speaker: The Lord
